RewardText.en: All Reward Types have an additional reward
RewardText.zh: 所有奖励类型都有额外一个奖励

RewardText.en: All Reward Types are Divination Cards
RewardText.zh: 全奖励类型都是命运卡
全奖励类型都是传奇物品
全奖励类型都是通货物品

RewardText.en: Monster's Minions drop a randomly-chosen Reward Type
RewardText.zh: 怪物的召唤生物掉落一件随机选择的奖励类型

RewardText.en: Rewards are rolled 1 additional time, choosing the rarest result
RewardText.zh: 奖励额外重掷 1 次，选择最稀有的结果

RewardText.en: Rewards are rolled 2 additional times, choosing the rarest result
RewardText.zh: 奖励额外重掷 2 次，选择最稀有的结果

RewardText.en: Rewards are rolled 4 additional times, choosing the rarest result
RewardText.zh: 奖励额外重掷 4 次，选择最稀有的结果

RewardText.en: Rewards are rolled 6 additional times, choosing the rarest result
RewardText.zh: 奖励额外重掷 6 次，选择最稀有的结果

RewardText.en: Items dropped from the Monster and its Minions are Corrupted
RewardText.zh: 怪物和它的召唤生物掉落的物品都被腐化
